source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A proposal is to build a 1000-MW electric power plant with steam as the working fluid. The condensers are to be cooled with river water. The maximum steam temperature is 550\circ\text{C}, and the pressure in the condensers will be 10 kPa. Estimate the temperature rise of the river downstream from the power plant.
